'''zhajuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zambo|zambo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zambo|zambo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhajuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæjivith|zhæjivith]] || [[word:zhæjivij|zhæjivij]] || [[word:zhæjivish|zhæjivish]] || [[word:zhæjivi|zhæjivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajujuvuth|zhajujuvuth]] || [[word:zhajujuvuj|zhajujuvuj]] || [[word:zhajujuvush|zhajujuvush]] || [[word:zhajujuvu|zhajujuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajuvuth|zhajuvuth]] || [[word:zhajuvuj|zhajuvuj]] || [[word:zhajuvush|zhajuvush]] || [[word:zhajuvu|zhajuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajufvuth|zhajufvuth]] || [[word:zhajufvuj|zhajufvuj]] || [[word:zhajufvush|zhajufvush]] || [[word:zhajufvuf|zhajufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhajuvuthu|zhajuvuthu]] || [[word:zhajuvuju|zhajuvuju]] || [[word:zhajuvushu|zhajuvushu]] || [[word:zhajuvuku|zhajuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhajuvuth|zhajuvuth]] || [[word:zhajuvuj|zhajuvuj]] || [[word:zhajuvush|zhajuvush]] || [[word:zhajuvu|zhajuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhajuvuthul|zhajuvuthul]] || [[word:zhajuvujul|zhajuvujul]] || [[word:zhajuvushul|zhajuvushul]] || [[word:zhajuvukul|zhajuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhajuvuthuthu|zhajuvuthuthu]] || [[word:zhajuvujuju|zhajuvujuju]] || [[word:zhajuvushushu|zhajuvushushu]] || [[word:zhajuvuku|zhajuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhajuvuthun|zhajuvuthun]] || [[word:zhajuvujun|zhajuvujun]] || [[word:zhajuvushun|zhajuvushun]] || [[word:zhajuvukun|zhajuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhajuvuthuoro|zhajuvuthuoro]] || [[word:zhajuvujuoro|zhajuvujuoro]] || [[word:zhajuvushuoro|zhajuvushuoro]] || [[word:zhajuvukuoro|zhajuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
